text: a cow's favorite workout ? milk shakes .
a baker's favorite horror movie ? " the bread dead . "
sodium's favorite movie ? " salt . "
a witch's favorite exercise ? broom squats .
i asked my cat to help me with my computer , and he just sat on the keyboard and typed " pppppppppppppppppppppppppppp . " it's a purr-ogramming language , apparently .
a cow's favorite workout ? ground beef squats .
a coffee bean's favorite exercise ? the espresso press .
a potato's favorite exercise ? the couch potato crunch .
a pocket calculator's favorite dance ? the square root .
the earth's favorite music genre ? rock .
the atheist bear's favorite joke : " knock knock . " " who's there ? " " a bear . " " a bear who ? " " exactly no divine bear , just me and this wood . "
an apple's favorite exercise ? the core crunch .
my constipated owl only asks , " wh ...  ooo ...  when ? "
the zombie motivational speaker's entire seminar was just " rrrrraaaaahhhhhhhrrrg , " but honestly , i felt seen .
what's a pirate's favorite birthday song ? " yo ho ho and a bottle of rum ...  and also cake . "
a baker's favorite horror movie ? " the loaf of the living bread . "
the ghost left a polite message on my mirror : " boo . p . s . please windex . "
the number " 5 " married the word " vowel " ; now they have three children : a , e , and iou .
the crossword puzzle's " easy " section had a clue for " section "  ...  it was " part . "
i told a joke in binary ; it only had one good word : " 01001000 01000001 " ( which is " ha " ) .
the robot's pickup line opener was , " 01001000 01101001 , " which translates to " hi " and also " i need oil . "
the coop's door had a sign : " pull . lay . exit . repeat . "
the buddhist's hotdog stand mantra : " om ...  nom nom nom . "
my birthday party had a " surprise " theme , so everyone just yelled " boo ! " instead of " happy birthday . "
a vegetarian's favorite workout ? lettuce lifts and squash stretches .
the traffic light at the library only shows " read , " " yield , " and " reference . "
the bee's favorite word game ? spelling " bee " with actual bees .
a pilot's favorite exercise ? wing-ing it .
the dictionary defines " loop " as " see : definition of loop . "
what's a pirate's favorite birthday song ? " yo ho ho and a bottle of rum ...  and cake , matey ! "
my ladder's favorite movie ? " step brothers , " obviously .
my computer's favorite exercise is a hard drive .
the alphabet's favorite exercise ? the vowel movement .
the middle of a mummy's favorite song ? " wrap " music .
my desert survival kit is just a bacon tree shade and breakfast .
the north pole's favorite dance move ? the pole vault .
what's a pirate's favorite birthday song ? " yo ho ho and a bottle of rum ...  and a cake , matey ! "
santa's favorite type of music ? wrap .
the dwarf's bath mat simply read , " caution : low tide . "
the alphabet's favorite type of music ? r b , naturally .
santa's favorite type of weather is a " ho ho ho " -frost .
in my dream , my computer's error message was , " pillow not detected . please install one for optimal sleep performance . "
in our house , the card game " go fish " has been renamed " go fix the marriage . "
a teacher said , " name two pronouns . " the child shouted , " who , me ? " and got an a .
the virgin vinyl record whispered , " please be gentle this is my first spin . "
the existentialist train sighed , " i choo , therefore i am ...  late , probably . "

a sloth , moving with the deliberate style of an investigative reporter , finally asked his first question : " so ...  for the record ...  what ...  took ...  you ...  so ...  long ...  to ...  get ...  here ? "
a communist tells a joke : " knock , knock . " " who's there ? " " the people . " " the people who ? " " exactly funny how that works . "
my amnesiac date asked , " is this our first kiss ? " i said , " for you , maybe . "
the internet's favorite comedian ? a " . com " with a killer domain name .
my nihilist friend's favorite comedy special is the heat death of the universe it's the ultimate punchline .
the bartender saw a cat reading a newspaper at the bar and asked , " anything interesting ? " the cat said , " just the classifieds looking for a better scratching post than my human's sofa . "
the priest asked why the computer kept freezing during the sermon ; it had too many holy windows open .
the skeleton's party was so dull , even the disco ball was just a skull on a string .
a boy's orange rolled into an open grave ; he shrugged , " well , that's one way to get a burial plot twist . "
the librarian caught a book whispering secrets to another and had to separate them into the " non-fiction " and " gossip " sections .
i'm fluent in the language of my cat ; her sign for " feed me " is knocking everything off the counter .
my ice cube tried to raise the room temperature ; talk about a chilling effect .
a roman senator asked for help with algebra , so i said , " let x be the gladiator you can't defeat . "
i asked my fridge for a relationship status update , and it said , " it's complicated ...  we're in a quarantine . "
the mountain's favorite band is " the rolling stones , " but it prefers its rock to stay perfectly still , thank you very much .
my bakery job is perfect ; i just follow the recipe to earn a little bread .
i asked my partner if they wanted to learn welsh , and they said " ie , " which i later found out means " yes , " right before they left .
the communist lightbulb's revolutionary manifesto : " workers of the world , unite ! and change me when i burn out , collectively . "
the caterer lost satellite navigation and arrived late , blaming the poor reception on the venue .
cinderella tried to explain modern sports to the prince , saying , " at the ball , you dance ; in football , you tackle . let's not get the two confused at our wedding . "
i entered my iron in a race ; it came in last because it kept stopping to steam .
mommy told her son the secret to a happy year : " always laugh at dad's jokes , even the ones from last year . "
astley started a disney cover band called " never gonna sing you a whole song . "
a couple asked the bartender for relationship advice ; he pointed to the " no running " sign and said , " applies to commitments too . "
the console's favorite road trip game is " player vs . pothole : the open-world adventure . "
a watch walked into a bar and said , " i'll have a hand on the rocks , please . "
my home's echo is so polite , it repeats everything i say but adds " please . "
the dumbbell told a great joke at the gym , but it was a real weight for laughter .
the magician's trick to pull a tennis ball from his pocket failed it was a complete racket .
i asked a communist clown why he was so funny ; he said , " the means of production ...  of laughter ! "
at my bakery job interview , they asked if i could handle the dough i said , " i'm on a roll . "
my reality tv show pitch was rejected for being " too realistic , " which hurt my fictional feelings .
the sun's favorite type of movie ? a solar eclipse documentary it finds the plot totally engaging .
a russian doll walked into a bar and ordered a vodka , then another , and another , and another turns out it was just one very thirsty guy .
the restaurant's menu gave me a tough choice : " mystery meat " or " chef's surprise " ; i went with the surprise , and it was the chef proposing .
my doctor said fighting cancer builds character . i said , " i'd rather be a shallow person with a clean bill of health . "
i asked a rabbit for investment advice ; he said to put all my money in hare funds .
in math class , a girl asked the teacher if she could use a calculator for emotional support during the exam .
what do you call a cow with a bell on one horn and a horn on her bell ? a confused percussionist .
at the bar , i asked the bartender for a joke with entendre ; he said , " my life , " and poured a stiff one .
in the deep south , they say a good teethbrush is like a sweet tea for your mouth my toothbrush just whispered " y'all " after i used it .
my factory job is taste-testing expired soda ; it's a very flat career .
the web developer got jealous of the spider , because its site had better traffic and fewer bugs .
the kind king offered me his gold crown as a thank you for returning his lost pet dragon .
the priest's favorite shower soap is called " divine intervention " it makes stains disappear like miracles .
my friend asked for life direction , so i handed him a remote control and said , " try pressing'menu'. "
the dog's favorite band is tree bark 182 they always have a ruff sound .
the werewolf's cooking channel failed because every recipe began with , " first , catch a man in the woods . "
darth vader tried online dating , but his profile said , " looking for someone to rule the galaxy with ...  must love capes and dramatic entrances . "
santa claus and bill cosby started a podcast ; it was called " the north pole's most uncomfortable stories . "
i asked my keyboard for a dramatic shift in tone , and it responded entirely in comic sans .
i saw a brothel with a sign saying , " exit only , " which made the entrance very , very crowded .
the coven's potion required blood of an enemy , sap from a cursed maple , and water from a laughing brook it just made really aggressive pancakes .
my bed and i have a standing appointment every night though i'm usually lying down for it .
the cheese felt lonely , so it went to the party and found it was a grate time .
the doughboy's therapist told him to express his feelings , so he baked a doughnut and whispered , " i feel ...  glazed . "
i asked my barber for a style that says " hope and change " but screams " you're fired ! " he handed me a mirror and an invoice .
the computer mouse challenged the baseball to a duel , but it was just a pointless click .
the peanut's autobiography is titled " a long and winding road to being salted . "
i dreamed my head was a boat in a storm ; my therapist called it a " thought tsunami . "
i bought a cup labeled " financial security , " but all it did was hold my money while i cried into it .
my new dance move is called " the step-parent " it involves awkwardly entering the situation and trying to fit in .
i saw a tree in harlem trying to hail a cab ; it was really sticking out its limb .
the priest downloaded a language app to learn latin ; now he orders coffee in ancient tongues and gets very confused baristas .
the nurse's composure was impressive , especially considering her golf course was next to the emergency room .
their boat debate : " you'd sell the oars ! " " you'd lock them in a basement ! " meanwhile , the boat drifted toward russia .
i told the beach i needed a loan , and it said , " shark , you're going to need a bigger bank . "
the boomerang salesman told me , " this one's guaranteed to return , " and i said , " so was jesus . "
the actor broke his leg on stage , but the show must go on , so he played it as a tragic comedy .
why did the scarecrow win an award ? because he was outstanding in his field a true test of character .
my boss asked why i was late , so i showed him a slideshow of my commute's scenic highlights .
my milk said it needed space , so i put it back in the fridge ; now it's giving me the silent treatment .
on a scale of one to sandusky , how awkward was anthony's birthday party at the pool ?
i asked the burglar why he was robbing my art studio , and he said , " i heard this place had some great sketchy characters . "
i made a deal with my alarm clock to let me sleep in ; it agreed , but now it only rings on weekends .
a beaver's favorite part of building a dam ? the groundbreaking ceremony , where they actually break ground .
the lazy ceiling fan said moving air was a waste of effort , so it just hangs around .
a police horse told his officer , " i think we took a wrong trot back there , " to which the cop sighed , " you're right , but my gps only works on patrol cars . "
the king's decree that naptime was law was the only policy his child heir ever fully supported .
my morning commute is like a bad magic show : i pay all my attention to the traffic , and yet somehow , my car still disappears into thin air .
the town council debated for hours on the proper number of bubbles allowed in the public fountain .
the kleptomaniac comedian only told stolen puns ; his defense was , " i'm just taking things literally . "
charle tried to catch some fog yesterday ; he mist .
the soup was so spicy , my mouth demanded a formal apology in writing a single word : " why ? "
jesus and hawking walk into a bar ; jesus orders water , and hawking explains the fluid dynamics of holy hydration .
the detective drew a circle around the clue and said , " i think we're missing the point . "
i set my computer password to " gump , " but now every login screen greets me with , " life is like a reboot you never know what errors you're gonna get . "
i asked the bartender for something strong after a long day at the hospital ; he handed me a mop and said , " cleanup in aisle three . "
my motivation and i are in a constant game of tag , and it's always'it'.
the deer won the staring contest by a wide margin ; he had that classic , unblinking " deer in the headlights " eye .
my new year's resolution for this year is to finally use the calendar i bought last year .
when i asked siri the meaning of life , the answer was just a loading icon and a suggestion to port my contacts from my old iphone .
my shovel's invention was a tiny umbrella ; it said the ground was always raining dirt on its parade .
i hired a comedian to explain the difference between " your " and " you're " ; he said , " your grammar is a joke , and you're laughing at the difference . "
the stoner's guide to home security : put a sign on the door that says , " beware of the existential dread . "
at the bar , a magician showed the bartender a rope he could cut and restore . the bartender said , " neat trick , but i've seen better splits in customer opinions . "
the black hole trainer dismissed my complaint about gravity , saying , " stop being so negative . "
my guided meditation said to visualize a safe space , so i imagined a room where my phone battery never drops below 50 .
i showed my wife a picture of a stubborn sticker and said , " this is us , " and she replied , " only if the picture includes a warranty for that attachment . "
my ghost follows me on twitter and only likes my old , embarrassing posts .
i asked my girlfriend if she wanted to share a pizza and a beer , and she said , " only if you share your feelings too , " so i ordered a whole pie for myself .
i launched a business selling night-vision goggles ; my wife's first review was , " i can finally see you sneaking snacks . "

a horse walked into the bar and the barman immediately slid a beer over . the horse asked , " how did you know ? " the barman said , " a little birdie told me ...  actually , it was a very panicked jockey . "
my horse became a detective , but its only clue was a single neigh the case remains unsolved , unfortunately .
my computer got an adele virus ; now all my error messages are delivered in powerful , soulful ballads .
in the game of life , chuck norris doesn't roll dice ; the dice ask him what number they should land on .
i asked the bank for an account with no fees ; they gave me a piggy bank and a sympathetic pat .
the naughty list now has a clause : one act of kindness before christmas eve can void the entire entry , much to santa's paperwork dismay .
i heard logan paul is starting a farm ; he's only growing clickbait and a single , sad paul of corn .
this morning , my coffee looked at me and said , " you're not you without me , " and honestly , it's not wrong .
my son asked his parent for a pet dragon ; the parent said , " we already have a lizard that forgets it's a lizard . "
my grandfather's antique stool has seen more history than a textbook , and frankly , it's just as wooden .
i asked my horse to pass the mayo , but he just looked at me and said , " neigh , that's a condiment for neigh-bors . "
an australian ghost is called a " boo-merang " because it always comes back to haunt you .
the library's suicide prevention seminar was awkwardly scheduled right after the " how to tie a noose " knot-tying workshop .
the computer joined a band as the drummer , but it kept dropping the beat turns out it had a hard drive .
i asked my physics teacher if we could study something with more kinetic energy , because this lesson on potential is just sitting there .
my happiness coach said to follow my bliss , so i chased a butterfly into a police sting operation .
why did the japanese smartphone go to therapy ? it had too many unresolved ka-moji issues .
the doctor said my hospital visit was due to an " inverted yoga accident , " which is just a fancy way of saying i got stuck in a laundry hamper .
a relative at a wedding joked , " i hope the next time we gather isn't at a funeral , " to which the groom replied , " depends on how the cake tastes . "
i saw a mosh pit at a flutist's concert ; now i have a wobbly leg and a loose tooth to remember it by .
the yoga instructor said to hold the pose until i felt a burn my wallet caught fire from the class fees .

my brother tried to impress a date by describing his beer as " hoppy with a hint of citrus . " the bartender leaned over and whispered , " sir , that's my brother's homemade lemonade you stole from the kid's menu . "
why did the german bulb refuse to laugh ? it had a very rigid filament of humor .
a nervous bartender served a snake a cocktail and said , " careful , it's a bit venomous . " the snake laughed , " don't worry , i'm used to toxic relationships . "
the farmer told the snowman , " you can't grow carrots in my field , " to which the snowman replied , " why not ? i'm just trying to raise my own nose ! "
my neighbor lent me money after a long conversation , but the interest rate is paid in awkward neighborhood small talk .
an archaeologist's career advice : " always date the ruins , but never let the ruins date you . "
i asked my depression if it wanted to go for a walk , and it said , " i would , but i've already exhausted all my steps for the day by getting out of bed . "
we upgraded our antenna before the award ceremony , just to ensure a flawless reception of the host's bad jokes .
i left my phone in the shower by accident , and now it's sending steamy texts to my contacts .
the pessimistic barber gave me a haircut and said , " on the bright side , it can only grow down from here . "
my imam says i bring peace to the religion , but that's only because i fall asleep during the sermon .
i wanted a tombstone that plays my favorite song , but " another one bites the dust " felt a bit on the nose .
my grandad tried to carry water in a bucket with a hole ; now he calls it his mobile fountain feature .
why did the alligator bring a ladder to the library ? he wanted to read the highest " gator " -ed texts .
my fridge is so cold , it created a new corner of the room where the air is exactly one degree cooler , and now my vegetables are forming a union .
the bartender offered a termite a complimentary piece of ice . the termite said , " no thanks , i prefer my drinks at room termite-ature . "
my car has a kind heart and a lead foot it speeds to charity events .
i told my wife grocery shopping with a list is like a treasure hunt , but she said , " then why do you always return with plastic jewels and regret ? "
my fridge has such a distinct smell , i think it's trying to tell me a ghost story in expired dairy .
the most committed cancer i know is my aunt's crabgrass ; it's invasive , tenacious , and ruins every family picnic .
robin realized the difference in their partnership when batman said , " i brood on gargoyles , " and he had to add , " i get stuck fixing the bat-toaster . "
the alien applied for asylum , calling earth a " safe haven , " but was rejected because our immigration system had no checkbox for " fleeing a supernova . "
at the luxury dealership , a snail salesman proudly showed me a convertible , boasting , " with this , you'll finally be able to overtake a gardener . "
an apple rolled off my dashboard and honked the horn my car thinks it's a fruity alarm system , and the window's the only witness .
my counterfeit dollar identifies as a million-dollar bill , proving gender and value are both social constructs .
my friend's speech impediment makes him say " arm " as " farm , " so he invited me to " shake his farm " and i was very confused .
why did the sausage go to therapy ? it had too many unresolved wurst-case scenarios .
i asked a clock for advice on how to get more sleep , and it told me to just watch the seconds tick by .
why did the american bring a ladder to the cherokee history room ? to get to the top shelf of their heritage .
i asked a dollar for investment advice , and it said , " i'm not a financial expert , but i do have a lot of cents . "

a dog at a bar kept tapping his paw impatiently , so the bartender said , " you already have water . " the dog sighed , " i'm waiting for my friend we're here for the'paw-ty'and he's always fashionably late . "
a girl saw an ant doing the backstroke in her water glass and said , " now that's a pool party i wasn't invited to . "
during a fire safety demonstration , the teacher asked the class for an example of'stop , drop , and roll ,'and timmy demonstrated with his report card .

my husband tried to organize a surprise party for me , but he forgot to invite anyone , so it was just him jumping out from behind the couch shouting " boo ! " honestly , the most accurate surprise of our marriage .
my facebook life is so uneventful , i considered updating my status to " breathing . "
an immigrant arrives and observes one stark difference : here , you take out a mortgage for a house ; back home , you take out a relative .
i asked a fish for investment advice , and it said the stock market is a sea of volatility .
the dog's onion costume was a real hit , though it made everyone weep at the pet show .
after a transplant mix-up , my brain belongs to a detective , but my mind is still trying to find itself .
my friend said his ski trip was " all downhill from the middle , " which was confusing since we were at the lodge bar .
my sister tried to sell her tears as artisanal sea salt , but the market was a little dry .
my phone's battery life is so bad , it now identifies as a plant cell constantly needs sunlight and water to function .
the bartender said , " we don't serve time-travelers here . " a chemist walked in and said , " great , i'll have a drink before you finish that sentence . "
my brother bet my sister she couldn't make a car out of spaghetti , but you should've seen her face when it pasta way .
they put my anxious dog in the mri ; the machine showed his thoughts were just squirrels and mailmen .
yesterday , i tried to describe the entire world using only words from my thesaurus ; it was an epoch , sphere , and orb-iting disaster .
my addiction to reading in the bath is a fluid dynamic i can't escape .
an ant told a girl he was thirsty , so she offered him a drop of water ; he said , " that's a whole ocean to me , but can you make it sparkling ? "
the zoo's new rhino paid for his enclosure with a platinum credit card ; i guess he really wanted to build some serious equity .
remember in math class when they said you wouldn't always have a calculator ? my phone remembers that and laughs every time i ask it what 7 x 8 is .
i asked my head for a creative solution to my problems , and it confidently replied , " have you tried napping on it ? "
i tried to use leftover turkey as a hockey puck ; the dog retrieved it , but the goalie surrendered .
i asked my chess partner for a post-game check , but he said , " mate , you're bankrupt in strategy . "
my daughter started a school rumor so wild , the local newspaper sent a reporter to investigate ; it was about the cafeteria meatloaf being a retired sponge .
a burglar froze on the stairs when my darling called from downstair , " honey , can you grab the remote ? the heist documentary is starting . "
my egg tried to make a french exit during breakfast , but it just ended up sunny-side up on the floor .
my kid in the backseat asked how car accidents happen , so i said " watch this " and merged without signaling .
the fisherman's tales were always punny ; he had a net full of witty cod pieces .
the delivery guy said my package was fragile , so i signed for it carefully , only to find it was a self-help book titled " how to unpack your emotional package . "
yesterday , my pet rock ran away ; the police said it was a stone-cold case .
my grandfather told me , " son , a true lifetime achievement is when your heart warms more at a grandchild's laugh than at a winning lottery ticket . "
i told the barista at starbucks my americano was cold ; she said , " that's because you order confidence , not coffee . "
the politician promised a firm hand on the platform's economy , so he just raised the ticket prices .
a boy touring the parthenon with a crowbar was stopped by a guard who said , " sorry , lad , we already have enough columns . "
i tried to impress my date by juggling a knife near a tree , but the only thing that fell was our relationship .
i bought a " vintage " lamp from an online advertisement , and its only working condition is that it makes me curse every month when the payment is due .
i tried to take a picture of my face but my camera said , " no , i prefer landscapes . "
our relationship is a lot like a quadratic equation : complex , with two possible outcomes , and i usually end up squared away .
my wife asked if i'd still love her without money ; i said , " of course , but i'd miss your enthusiastic budget meetings . "
i went to a mushroom party and the bouncer said , " no spores allowed after 10 pm . "
i tried to write my wife an apology letter , but she intercepted it and wrote " denied " in big red letters across the top .
when bill clinton visited a wig shop , he asked about the difference between the toupees ; the stylist said , " well , sir , the main difference is which head you're trying to cover . "
i tried to smoke a cigarette on a rowboat , but it was just a drag .
they say life is short , but geometry proves it's actually full of infinite , parallel lines of regret .
the historian had a clear vision of the past year , which he summarized with a historically inaccurate pun .
the couple's secret to a happy marriage ? they treat every compromise like a pillow fight , and every resolved issue feels like a last-second touchdown .
the klingon opera " the toilet paper of kahless " is a gripping saga about honor , glory , and a terrible two-ply shortage .
my parrot laid an egg and now gives financial advice ; it says to never put all your eggs in one basket .
a baby tried to start a union for better nap times , but the world said , " sorry , you're still in your probationary period . "
i bought a convertible so my dog could enjoy the wind , but he just uses it as a giant , moving food bowl for airborne snacks .
i tried to parallel park my benz next to a mercedes , but they both demanded valet service and a complimentary car wash .
the detective found a single rose at the crime scene , a broken piano key in the victim's hand , and concluded the butler did it with the pipe organ in the ballroom .
the office christmas decoration committee is just three people debating if tinsel is " professional confetti . "
i bought a jacket with a " eject " button on the sleeve ; it's only been useful for getting out of conversations with my neighbor .
the school play about a desert was ruined when my pet tarantula forgot its one line : " it's dry out here . "
i mixed ambition and a coke , took a big drink , and now my head's writing business plans in bubble letters .
my inflatable mattress deflated at the campground , so now my tent is just a fabric room of disappointment .
i promised my daughter we'd go camping in a month , but she's already practicing by turning her desk chair into a tent with a blanket .
batman got a speeding ticket ; robin tried to lighten the mood by asking if the bat-signal came with a coupon for a free car wash .
i asked the blacksmith why his dog was so calm , and he said , " oh , he's bolt upright never gets unhinged . "
my therapist recommended a talking chair , but all it does is sit in judgment .
the actor forgot his line , so he just shook his leg and played it off as interpretive dance .
i tried to give my ear a pep talk , but it just turned a deaf ear to me .
the airman bought extra insurance after his induction , just in case he was accidentally launched into space during a routine drill .
the behavior of autocorrect is frankly sinister ; it keeps changing " meeting " to " mating , " and hr is starting to ask questions .
the dealership's top salesman was a snail who perfected the slow-burn negotiation customers would agree to anything just to leave .
i asked the pianist for a hand with the sheet music , and he played a piece so moving it rattled my very bones .
the helium salesman became a bar tender and only serves drinks that lift your spirits and your voice to new heights .

a programmer walked into a bar and ordered a drink , then another , and another . the bartender asked about the problem . " my hardware can't handle my software's demands , " the programmer sighed , patting his liver .
they added a " suspense mod " to the bar's trivia night ; now you have to answer in the form of a cliffhanger .
an athlete tried to write a book about running , but it had no plot , just a lot of character development .
i told my iphone to remind me to fix the loose button on my jacket when i got home , and it scheduled a genius bar appointment .
an assassin started a " president removal service " but got confused and became a barber .
i told my stalker i needed space , so now he orbits my house in a satellite .
santa got stuck in a chimney , and a child below yelled , " need more milk and cookies for lubrication ! "
i tried to catch some fog , but i mist clearly , my experimental design was flawed .
the skunk , a natural scenter , held a press conference right in the middle of the picnic to debut its new fragrance .
my wife counted nine clouds , but i said there were ten ; turns out the tenth was just her glare blocking the sun .
my gender-fluid friend opened a bakery ; their specialty is pronouns-cons and she they-cakes .
i bought a lot of lottery tickets , dreaming of mucho dinero , but i won a lifetime supply of disappointment instead .
my wife sleep-talked at midnight , ordering a " middle-of-the-night special " from a dream menu , and now i owe a phantom pizza guy twenty bucks .
i tried to get my dog to look at my bank statement and tell me where all the money for treats went .
a person described their antidepressant as " a tiny internal life coach who works 24 7 and doesn't charge by the hour . "
the pickpocket was so bad he only managed to steal a golf ball and leave a sand trap in my pocket .
a traveler at the bar bragged , " i've been to 30 countries ! " the bartender yawned , " i've been to the storeroom . it's more of an adventure . "
a condescending guard told the dwarf prisoner , " i'd say you have a long sentence , but everything's relative . "
this year , my girlfriend's new year's resolution was to be less of a perfectionist a real killer of her previous resolutions .
a prince botched a spell meant to summon gold and instead summoned a year's supply of moldy cheese his kingdom was not gouda with it .
my friend lee tried to write a country song , but he couldn't find a word to rhyme with " truck " besides ...  well , " lee . "
my daughter said this birthday makes her feel ancient ; i reminded her it's only been a year since she thought wifi was magic .
why did the snowman refuse to play cards with the vampire ? he was afraid of getting frostbite from his cold deck .
a doctor at the airport quarantine zone said my excessive puns were a terminal disease , so they denied my boarding pass .
the scarecrow tried to change careers , but he had no other field experience .
they say having a baby changes your whole color scheme , but a vasectomy just paints a permanent'off-white . '
the wife whispered the safe's combination was " hisweightplustwentypounds , " and he's been dieting ever since .
our relationship is like a subscription service - i keep forgetting what i signed up for , but the monthly emotional charges are automatic .
i bought a talking chess set , but the king just yells " save me ! " every turn , which isn't helpful and stresses everyone out .
the room temperature adjusts itself to chuck norris's preference out of respect .
